_comment: openclaw-superpowers config snippet — how to use this file
_comment_detail: This file contains the agent definitions needed for openclaw-superpowers.
Option A: Merge manually into your openclaw.json.
Add the entries in 'agents.list' to your existing agents.list array.
Add the 'subagents' block if you don't have one (or merge the allowAgents list).
Replace <username> with your Unix username throughout.
Option B: Use openclaw config patch.
(This deep-merges the snippet into your live config.)

list.label: Coding Agent
list.description: Software engineering orchestrator. Plans, delegates to implementer/reviewer subagents, coordinates results.

list.label: Implementer Agent
list.description: Leaf implementation agent. Builds one task at a time following TDD. No sub-subagents.

list.label: Reviewer Agent
list.description: Leaf review agent. Reviews code and specs for correctness and quality. Read-only. No sub-subagents.
